description.value:
Uncontrolled resource consumption in the Intel(R) Distribution of OpenVINOâ„¢ Toolkit before version 2021.4 may allow an unauthenticated user to potentially enable denial of service via local access.

Reason for inclusion in AVID: CVE-2021-33073 describes an uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability in the Intel Distribution of OpenVINO Toolkit, which is a software component used to run AI inference workloads. This impacts AI software stacks and could enable denial of service. It affects a runtime/library commonly used in AI pipelines, thus relevant to the software supply chain for general-purpose AI systems. The report provides explicit CVE coverage and a security advisory reference, establishing a clear security vulnerability with evidence.
